task: Binary classification: predict whether a client subscribes to a term deposit
threshold_rule: highest threshold meeting recall >= 0.75 on validation set

data_handling.duration: Dropped because it leaks target information

known_limitations: Positive class is imbalanced at roughly 11%
Precision is low because the threshold is tuned to satisfy recall >= 0.75
Prototype created in Colab and must be moved into the production repository
